name: Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine cornstarch, salt, 1/2 cup cold water.
2. Gradually add hot water and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until the mixture boils and thickens.
3. Boil for 1 minute. Mix in egg yolks, then blend into sugar mixture. Cook and stir for 1 minute.
4. Remove from heat and add butter, lemon juice, and rind. Cool slightly.
5. Pour into baked pie shell. Cool to room temperature.
6. For the meringue, beat egg whites with cream of tartar until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread meringue over filling, carefully sealing to the edge of the crust.
8. Bake in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 5-10 minutes, or until the meringue is browned.
Microwave Method:
1. In a 1½-quart casserole, combine cornstarch, salt, and 1/2 cup cold water.
2. Heat remaining water in microwave on high for 2-3 minutes. Gradually add to cornstarch mixture.
3. Microwave for 3-6 minutes until very thick, stirring every 2 minutes.
4. Mix a little hot mixture into egg yolks, then blend into sugar mixture.
5. Microwave on high for 1 minute, stirring in butter, lemon rind, and juice.
6. Cook lightly and pour into pie shell. Make meringue as directed for conventional oven.
